overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunlit Los Santos neighborhood. The journey begins on a commercial sidewalk with convenience stores, transitions past a church and residential houses, continues alongside graffiti-covered walls and apartment buildings, and ends at a street intersection. Palm trees line the streets throughout the clip.

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past storefronts and park benches

green and white convenience store with red beer wine signage

tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees. A pedestrian approaches and passes by closely. The camera passes a wooden bench with seated individuals and approaches a Beer Wine convenience store before crossing the street at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial and residential with church

events.description: moving from commercial storefronts into residential area with church building
turning corner onto residential sidewalk with single-family homes

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk past the church and residential houses

entered.detail: white gothic-style church with tall arched windows and red roof
single-story yellow residential house with chain link fence
detached garage with metal roll-up door

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and enters a mixed-use area featuring a prominent white church with gothic architecture. The scene transitions to a more residential character with yellow houses and chain link fences. The palm trees shift from the center of the view to the left side as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with apartment buildings and graffiti art

events.description: passing large colorful graffiti mural on concrete wall
transitioning from single-family homes to multi-story apartment building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past residential properties and a large graffiti wall

entered.detail: large concrete wall with green skull wearing hat and welcome back text
two-story white apartment building with se renta signs and balconies
wooden sign reading yes prop 208 in front of apartment

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk bordered by a chain link fence and residential properties. A prominent graffiti mural featuring a green skull with crossed pistols and welcome back text appears on the right. The scene shifts to a two-story apartment building with rental signs and flowering bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic control and commercial plaza

events.description: approaching stop sign at street intersection
crossing the intersection with moderate traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, pausing at the stop sign, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: standing at the corner then beginning to walk as the camera approaches

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign mounted on white pole at corner
standard traffic signal on metal pole
strip mall with various storefronts across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection marked by a stop sign and traffic lights. A pedestrian stands on the corner before beginning to walk. The camera crosses the wide intersection, passing through crosswalk markings, with a commercial plaza visible across the street. The palm trees recede into the distance as the open intersection dominates the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban neighborhood that transitions from a commercial strip into a residential area and finally opens into a wide street intersection. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing a wooden bench and a convenience store before the camera crosses the street. As the path curves, the environment shifts toward a mixed-use zone featuring a white gothic church and yellow residential houses bordered by chain link fences. The scene then moves past a prominent graffiti mural of a green skull and a two-story apartment building with flowering bushes before turning toward a stop sign and traffic lights. Finally, the camera crosses a wide intersection through white crosswalk markings, with the palm trees receding into the distance as a commercial plaza comes into view.
